item.title: 给自己理发
item.description: 给自己理发也不是一件麻烦且多么困难的事情，从自己理发已经过去半年多了，现在已经成了习惯。

item.title: About
item.description: Automated Soul and the Stargazer’s Quest In the realm of circuits, an automated soul, Whirring gears in harmony, a symphony of control. Stargazer, in the cosmic ballet of binary, Witnessing innocence in the algorithmic diary. A dance of electrons, a celestial trance, The soul in code, a digital expanse. Metaphors woven in lines of code, Philosophical dialectic, a journey to decode. The stargazer gazes, seeking eternity, In the pixels of the cosmic fraternity.
